svg.text: Backup & Resiliency on Microsoft Agent Framework
Agent-Driven Workflow · MCP Tools · Human-in-the-Loop · Checkpointing · Graceful Degradation
REST API · Session Mgmt · SSE Stream
AWS · Azure · GCP · M365 · Google Workspace
SmartProtect Rules · Threat Monitoring · Resilience Orchestration
MCP → 5 parallel calls (inventory, plan, policy, blueprints)
Protection Rules · Backup Policies · Compliance Review
backup_mock_data.json · Used when Agent or MCP unavailable
Every executor calls ctx.request_info(ScreenRequest) → SSE event → Frontend renders screen → User responds → ctx.send_message() to next executor
❶ User opens React SPA → ❷ POST /api/sessions creates WorkflowSession → ❸ SSE stream delivers ScreenRequest events → ❹ Executors call MCP tools + AI agents →
❺ User reviews & responds via POST /respond → ❻ ApprovalGateway: approve → yield_output | reject → loop to ProtectionAdvisor → ❼ Checkpoints saved between supersteps
• All 6 executors are agent-driven — AI generates recommendations, graceful fallback to mock data when unavailable
• MCP Integration — DiscoveryRunner, ProtectionAdvisor, and ResiliencyPlanner call Data Discovery MCP tools
• Checkpointing — FileCheckpointStorage persists state between supersteps; executors implement on_checkpoint_save/restore
• Reject Loop — ApprovalGateway → ProtectionAdvisor with feedback (max 50 iterations)
• Degradation Chain — Agent unavailable → MCP unavailable → backup_mock_data.json
